WITH cust_czk AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, Segment
  FROM customers
  WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
cons_2013 AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, AVG(Consumption) AS avg_cons
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE Date LIKE '2013%'
  GROUP BY CustomerID
),
seg_min AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, MIN(cs.avg_cons) AS min_avg_cons
  FROM cust_czk c
  JOIN cons_2013 cs ON c.CustomerID = cs.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT min_avg_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS year,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
inc AS (
    SELECT y12.Segment,
           ((y13.total_consumption - y12.total_consumption) * 100.0 / y12.total_consumption) AS pct_increase
    FROM yearly y12
    JOIN yearly y13
      ON y12.Segment = y13.Segment
     AND y12.year = '2012'
     AND y13.year = '2013'
)
SELECT (SELECT Segment FROM inc ORDER BY pct_increase DESC LIMIT 1) AS biggest_increase_segment,
       (SELECT Segment FROM inc ORDER BY pct_increase ASC LIMIT 1) AS lowest_increase_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (male_inpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_inpatient,0)) > (male_outpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_outpatient,0)) THEN 'Inpatient'
    WHEN (male_inpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_inpatient,0)) < (male_outpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_outpatient,0)) THEN 'Outpatient'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS more_males,
  ABS(
    (male_inpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_inpatient,0)) -
    (male_outpatient * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_outpatient,0))
  ) AS deviation_percentage
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_inpatient,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='-' AND SEX='M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatient,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_outpatient,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='+' AND SEX='M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatient
  FROM Patient
  WHERE Admission IS NOT NULL AND SEX IS NOT NULL
);	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

WITH sjs_patients AS (
  SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday, p.`First Date`
  FROM Patient p
  JOIN Examination e ON e.ID = p.ID
  WHERE UPPER(e.Diagnosis) = 'SJS'
),
oldest_sjs AS (
  SELECT ID, Birthday, `First Date`
  FROM sjs_patients
  ORDER BY Birthday ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT MAX(l.Date) FROM Laboratory l WHERE l.ID = o.ID) AS LabCompletionDate,
  CASE 
    WHEN strftime('%m-%d', o.`First Date`) < strftime('%m-%d', o.Birthday) 
    THEN (strftime('%Y', o.`First Date`) - strftime('%Y', o.Birthday)) - 1
    ELSE (strftime('%Y', o.`First Date`) - strftime('%Y', o.Birthday))
